backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (FuelSaleRecord, UserProfile, PurchaseOrder) and canister methods for managing fuel sale records and user profiles, with access control enforced via MixinAuthorization and persistent blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (fuel sales log form, history table, reporting/CSV export, visual theme) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of pages, modals, store, and layout components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, chart palette, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'Petrol Pump Management Software', mounting the app at #root and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, sales, fuel-sales-log, inventory, staff, customers, billing, reports, suppliers, expenses, etc.) under a shared AppLayout, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/billing/InvoiceD: Modal dialog displaying full invoice details (line items, subtotal, tax, total) with INR formatting, status badge, and actions to mark an invoice as paid or toggle its status.
frontend/src/components/customers/Redeem: Modal dialog allowing a user to redeem a specified number of loyalty points for a given customer, with validation against available balance and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/customers/Regist: A modal dialog for registering a new customer or editing an existing one, with fields for name, phone, email, and vehicle info, using the app store for state management.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Metric: A reusable dashboard card component that displays a metric with a title, value, unit, icon, optional trend badge, and color-coded status styling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StockG: A visual fuel stock gauge card showing current level as a percentage bar with a threshold marker, color-coded status (OK/Low/Critical), and fuel-type-specific styling.
frontend/src/components/inventory/StockA: A modal dialog that allows adding or removing stock (in litres) for a selected or pre-specified fuel inventory item, with an optional reason field.
frontend/src/components/inventory/Thresh: A modal dialog for configuring low-stock alert thresholds (in litres) for each fuel type, reading current levels from the app store and saving updates on submit.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The root application layout component that composes the Sidebar, TopBar, and a main content area rendered via TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: A responsive navigation sidebar with links to all major app sections, supporting mobile overlay behavior with open/close state and active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/layout/TopBar.ts: A top navigation bar displaying the app title, a mobile menu toggle, and a notification bell icon with a badge showing the count of low-stock inventory items.
frontend/src/components/sales/RecordSale: A modal dialog for recording a new fuel sale, with fields for fuel type, litres, price, payment method, pump number, staff, and optional customer. Validates inputs including stock availability, then creates a FuelSale record and adjusts inventory.
frontend/src/components/staff/ShiftFormM: A modal dialog for scheduling a staff shift, collecting staff member, date, start/end times, pump number, and status. Validates required fields and dispatches the new shift via the app store.
frontend/src/components/staff/StaffFormM: A modal dialog for adding or editing a staff member, with fields for name, role, phone, email, hire date, salary, and pay period. Supports both create and update operations via the app store.
frontend/src/components/suppliers/Purcha: A modal dialog for creating a purchase order, allowing selection of supplier, fuel type, quantity, price, dates, and status. Calculates total amount and submits the order to the app store.
frontend/src/components/suppliers/Suppli: A modal dialog for adding or editing a supplier, with fields for name, contact, email, address, supported fuel types (via checkboxes), and rating. Supports both create and update operations via the app store.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token when authenticated. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching the current user profile, all fuel sale records, and creating a new sale record via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Inter and Rajdhani fonts, and defines a dark navy/amber industrial design token theme with custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: Billing page that displays invoice summary cards (paid, pending, overdue totals), a searchable invoice table, and opens an InvoiceDetailModal on row selection.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single customer showing contact information, vehicle details, loyalty points, and aggregated purchase statistics derived from fuel sales records.
frontend/src/pages/Customers.tsx: Customers list page with search, summary stats (total customers, today's visits, loyalty points, avg purchase), and actions to add, edit, delete, or redeem points for customers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying summary metric cards (revenue, expenses, profit, customers), low stock alerts, and a recent sales list using data from the app store.
frontend/src/pages/Expenses.tsx: Expenses management page that lists, filters, and summarizes station expenses by category, with a modal form for adding new expense records.
frontend/src/pages/FuelSales.tsx: Fuel sales page showing summary stats (revenue, litres sold, unique customers), a filterable/searchable sales table, and a modal for recording new sales using local app store data.
frontend/src/pages/FuelSalesLog.tsx: Blockchain-backed fuel sales log page that fetches sale records from an ICP backend, supports creating new sales, displays daily and fuel-type summaries, and allows CSV export.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory management page that displays fuel stock levels with low-stock warnings and provides modals for adding stock and updating fuel prices.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, then redirects to profile setup or the main dashboard based on whether a user profile exists.
frontend/src/pages/Other.tsx: Renders a static 'Other' page displaying cards for Settings, Notifications, Security, Help & Support, and About sections, plus a footer attribution link.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Provides a profile setup form for authenticated users to enter their name, role, and contact, then saves the profile via the backend actor and redirects to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Displays fuel station analytics including a daily sales summary, 30-day revenue trend, fuel type breakdown pie chart, and expense vs. revenue comparison using Recharts.
frontend/src/pages/StaffManagement.tsx: Manages staff members and shift schedules with search, add/edit/delete staff via modals, shift scheduling, and a payroll summary display.
frontend/src/pages/Suppliers.tsx: Manages fuel suppliers and purchase orders with tabbed views for a supplier directory and order list, supporting add/edit/delete suppliers and order status updates.
frontend/src/store/appStore.ts: Defines the Zustand store with persisted state for the entire application, including TypeScript types and interfaces for fuel inventory, sales, customers, staff, suppliers, invoices, expenses, and shifts.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines all shared TypeScript types and interfaces for the fuel station app, including enums for fuel types, payment methods, and statuses, plus interfaces for sales, inventory, staff, customers, billing, suppliers, expenses, and reports.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides a utility function to export an array of FuelSaleRecord objects to a downloadable CSV file, with helpers to format fuel types, payment methods, and timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, an oklch-based color palette (navy, amber, fuel types, sidebar), and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, feature list, architectural notes, and new feature requests for the Fuel Station Sales Tracker app.
